chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-646 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2956/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 25.11.2025 Petitioner Muhammad Azam present in-person Mr. Manzoor Hussain N Larik, Advocate for respondent University Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate for respondent No.4 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** The petitioner, present in person, submits that he may be permitted to withdraw the instant petition with liberty to file a fresh one after curing certain legal defects. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition is dismissed as not pressed, along with all listed application(s). However, the petitioner is at liberty to file a fresh petition, if so permitted under the law. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
